title: Remove 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution from footer

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution text and any associated link or UTM tracking from the Footer component while preserving all other footer content
acceptanceCriteria: The footer no longer displays any text, link, or element referencing 'Caffeine AI' or 'Built by Caffeine AI'.
All other footer content (logo, nav links, contact info, copyright) is preserved exactly as in Version 20.
No broken layout or empty gap is left where the attribution previously appeared.

file_operations.description: Remove the caffeine.ai attribution element including its text, anchor tag, and any UTM tracking parameters. Preserve the brand logo, quick navigation links (Menu, Catering, Contact), contact details (phone and email), and copyright notice. Ensure no empty gaps or layout issues remain after removing the attribution.
